45],[259,569,1776533768769],[260,569,1776533768786],[264,568,1776533768803],[273,566,1776533768816],[286,561,1776533768828],[299,555,1776533768839],[310,549,1776533768852],[318,545,1776533768866],[322,542,1776533768879],[323,542,1776533768898],[324,542,1776533768905],[325,541,1776533768921],[325,540,1776533768927],[327,540,1776533768934],[328,539,1776533768947],[330,539,1776533768952],[331,538,1776533768966],[333,537,1776533768992],[334,536,1776533769005],[335,536,1776533769021],[336,535,1776533769037],[337,535,1776533769046],[339,534,1776533769059],[339,534,1776533769077],[340,534,1776533769085],[341,534,1776533769105],[342,534,1776533769135],[343,534,1776533769170],[343,535,1776533769193],[343,535,1776533769197],[344,535,1776533769201],[343,534,1776533769230],[342,534,1776533769243],[341,533,1776533769258],[340,532,1776533769264]],"mm-mp":19.423948220064727,"md":[[339,533,1776533769064]],"md-mp":4057.5,"mu":[[339,533,1776533769218]],"mu-mp":4077.25},"v":1,"tc":{}}
